mapper.select:
select a.id, a.title, a.context, a.publisher_id, u.username as `publisher_name`, u.avatar as `avatar`, a.image, a.status, a.is_illegal as `is_illegal`, a.like_num, a.create_time, a.update_time from article as a left join user as u on a.publisher_id = u.id left join article_category as ac on a.id = ac.article_id left join category as c on ac.category_id = c.id
and (a.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.context like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and c.name like concat('%', #{category}, '%')
and a.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and a.context like concat('%', #{context}, '%')
and u.username like concat('%', #{publisherName}, '%')
and a.is_illegal = #{violationStatus}
and a.status = #{status}
order by a.create_time desc, a.like_num desc

select a.id, a.title, a.context, a.publisher_id, u.username as `publisher_name`, u.avatar as `avatar`, a.image, a.status, a.like_num, a.create_time, a.update_time from article as a left join user as u on a.publisher_id = u.id left join article_views as v on a.id = v.article_id order by v.view_count desc limit 10

select a.id, a.title, a.context, a.publisher_id, u.username as `publisher_name`, u.avatar as `avatar`, a.image, a.status, a.like_num, a.create_time, a.update_time from article as a left join user as u on a.publisher_id = u.id where a.publisher_id = #{userId} order by a.create_time desc

select a.id, a.title, a.context, a.publisher_id, u.username as `publisher_name`, u.avatar as `avatar`, a.image, a.status, a.like_num, a.create_time, a.update_time from article as a left join user as u on a.publisher_id = u.id inner join article_like_collection as alc on a.id = alc.article_id where alc.user_id = #{userId} and alc.type = 2 order by a.create_time desc
